emails.subject: RE: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.subject_base: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.body: Charlie sent me the following message. "If the intent is to calculate the average between the two sets of numbers (NNG's vs ONEOK's) the "settlement number" would be 567,546.5!" As the settlement document states that the blank number is what we are going to use for "PTR", I think Charlie is correct. His number takes the average between the Plant PTR calculation and Northern's number.
